content.en:
An area of nothingness in the center of the battlefield.

The seven fifth-order void beasts were surrounded by large arrays, and these large arrays almost separated this void area from the void region of the outside world, becoming a battlefield between the six legendary lords and the seven-headed fifth-order void beasts.

At this time, the seven-headed fifth-order void beast did not panic at all.

One of the fifth-order Void Beasts sneered: "What's the use of you six Legendary Lords arranging these big arrays, do you still want to surround us, in terms of numbers, we are more than you!"

"Are you sure you have a lot of them?"

Lord of the Six Suns laughed.

The next moment.

The second Lord of the Six Suns appeared.

It's a doppelganger!

Then, the other five Legendary Lords also revealed their clones, among which the Lord of the Dark Mist actually had two clones, and the Lord of Ice Han actually had three clones.

As a result, now it seems that there are fifteen legendary lords in this place all of a sudden.

Fifteen to seven, naturally the lord alliance has the advantage.

"Doppelganger!"

The fifth-order void beasts naturally knew about the clones, but these six legendary lords had never shown their clones, making them forget about the clones.

The Six Yang Lord sneered: "At the beginning, the six of us were just clones besieging a fifth-order void beast, but we didn't expect that you fifth-order void beasts actually had the ability to turn into the light of nothingness, and hundreds of millions of void lights escaped into the depths of the void area, and we couldn't stop it in time, so we didn't dispatch the body." But now, these great arrays are specifically designed to restrain your Void Light to escape, and you have no way to escape. "

The fifth-order Void Beast still didn't panic.

"Hmph, so what, we don't need to run away at all, it will be difficult for you legendary lords to hurt us at all, but we can hurt you, even if you have the advantage in numbers, it is still us who wins in the end. The fifth-order Void Beast said confidently.

"Really?"

The Holy Peak Lord took out something that made the fifth-order Void Beast's face change.

It was a blood-colored spear!

However, the fifth-order void beast felt the aura of the fifth-order void beast from this blood-colored spear, especially one of the fifth-order void beasts was even more angry.

"Damn Legendary Lord, you actually refined the remnants of my original body into a Void Saint Soldier!!!"

The fifth-order void beast roared angrily.

Whoa!!

The other Immortal Lords also took out their own Void Saint Soldiers, and they were all refined from the remnants of the fifth-order Void Beast.

In this way, the Void Saint Soldier can be called a Legendary Void Saint Soldier, and it can inflict a certain amount of damage on the fifth-order Void Beast.

But these are not the hole cards that they used to kill the fifth-order Void Beasts, if they only relied on these, they would at most have an advantage, severely damage these seven Void Beasts, and it would take an incomparably long time to kill them.

Abrupt. The Lord of the Holy Peak threw out a seed. む This seed is their real hole card.

I saw the seed fall and turn into a tree, which grew in size and affected the surrounding void area.

The Void is covered in a large amount of land, flowers, trees, and mountains, and it spreads at a terrifying rate.

Almost in the blink of an eye, a space-time territory was born in this void area, not the kind of false space-time territory, but the real space-time territory, containing all kinds of innate eternal rules.

"The Void Beast has an obvious weakness, that is, the environment suitable for the Void Zone, there are no rules in the Void Zone, if you want to say it, it is the Void Rules, the Void Rules are difficult to perceive, and they are not listed by us as eternal rules, they belong to your Void Beast Rules. And once you Void Beasts enter the Heaven and Earth with a large number of eternal rules, their strength will be suppressed, and even the Void State will be weakened a little. "

"Now, we have created this space-time territory, which is tantamount to weakening your strength, or even weakening it several times over. "

After the Holy Peak Lord finished speaking, the seven-headed fifth-order void beasts all panicked.

The environment of the Void Region is suitable for them to fight, but now it has changed the heavens and the earth, and its strength has been greatly weakened.

While they can destroy the space-time realm, it will take a certain amount of time, and these Legendary Lords will not give them that time.

"Kill!"

The six Legendary Lords controlled a clone and body, holding the Legendary Void Saint Soldier, and attacked the seven fifth-order Void Beasts.

The seven-headed fifth-order void beast sensed the deadly danger and was desperate to tear this place apart and escape.

An amazing battle has begun!!

......

Outside the big formation.

A large number of Immortal Realm Lords formed protective circles here, preventing other Void Beasts from rescuing the seven fifth-order Void Beasts, and delaying time for the Six Great Leaders.

And all this has nothing to do with Ye Tian, he can't participate in such a big battle at the moment.........

He could only take the Eight Extremes Realm of the Eight Extremes Building to kill some more first-order void beasts, and that's it.

Time has passed year by year, and the war between the space-time territory and the Void Beast is gradually coming to an end.

this day.

The legendary lords of the Lords Alliance suppressed the battlefield of the seven-headed fifth-order void beasts, and those large arrays and the created space-time territory were still torn apart by the seven-headed fifth-order void beasts, but the fifth-order void beasts were extremely miserable.

The two fifth-order void beasts were killed, and the other fifth-order void beasts were severely damaged.

The moment they escaped, the surviving five-headed fifth-order void beast immediately exerted the ability of the light of nothingness, and its body turned into hundreds of millions of light of nothingness, countless obstacles in the void area, integrated into the rules of the void, and escaped into the depths of the void region at a speed that surpassed all else.

The Legendary Lord couldn't stop it, but he could block it as much as possible, leaving more remnants of the fifth-order Void Beast.

After the fifth-order Void Beasts fled, the Legendary Lords began to attack the third- and fourth-order Void Beasts.

I saw that the Lord of the Six Suns probed into the Void Zone, grabbed a fourth-order Void Beast, and killed it in a short period of time.

With the action of the six legendary lords, the third- and fourth-order Void Beasts fell one by one, and it was an extravagant hope to even escape.

The other Immortal Realm Lords and Immortal Realm Lords began to hunt and kill the first-order Void Beasts, which could end the battle faster and gain more at the same time.

Some more years passed, and the Void 1.9 Beasts were all but emptied, and a small number of Void Beasts fled back into the depths of the Void Zone.

The legendary lords did not dare to chase down to the depths of the Void Region, so this war ended, and the surviving Eternal Realm gained a lot, and the Eight Pole Towers also gained a lot.

At the very least, for them, to be able to harvest some Void Beast materials is a huge gain.

The first-order void beast could not be found, and Ye Tian's temporary team was disbanded.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to sort out his harvest.

The accumulation of these Void Beast materials is about equivalent to all the materials of the three Void Beasts, if he makes a single move, one Void Beast will not be able to kill him, let alone three heads.

It can be said that this time the harvest is very large.

"It's time to use the Void Beast material to improve your strength!"

Ye Tian muttered. _

Fei Lu reminds you: three things to read - ∪ collection, recommendation, and sharing!(wx_938914883)
